title: 'Arnown #0769
definition:
Arnon = "rushing stream"

 1) a river and surrounding valley in south Palestine, forms the
    border between Moab and the Amorites
nasbUsage:
Definition: Arnon = "rushing stream"

 1) a river and surrounding valley in south Palestine, forms the
    border between Moab and the Amorites

    NASB:  a roaring stream, a wadi and stream in Moab
